name: Amata
message: amata.com zoominfo.com/c/amata-corporation-public-company-ltd/2754121 Amata Corporation PCL. is a leading industrial estate developer in Southeast Asia, providing full-service industrial parks for global manufacturing companies. They focus on creating sustainable and innovative industrial environments with high-quality amenities and smart energy solutions. Their extensive locations across Thailand, Vietnam, Laos, and Myanmar offer businesses optimal logistical access to major infrastructure
